name: ssoe
description: VS Code extension that uses AI to catch issues traditional linters miss

enumDescriptions: Use an OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (local or remote).
Shell out to the claude CLI for scanning. Requires the claude CLI to be installed and authenticated.
ssoe.provider.description: Which provider to use for scanning.

ssoe.claudeModel.description: Claude model to use when provider is 'claude-cli'.

ssoe.apiKey.description: API key for the LLM service. Use 'not-needed' for local servers that don't require authentication.

ssoe.llmBaseUrl.description: Base URL of your OpenAI-compatible server (e.g. llama.cpp). Do not include /v1.

ssoe.llmModel.description: Model name to pass in requests. For llama.cpp this is usually ignored but must be non-empty.

ssoe.maxTokens.description: Max tokens for the scan response. Increase for large files.
